issues.message: Changed __contains__ from checking path existence to checking if it is a file. This breaks the contract for callers that rely on directory keys or symlinks.
issues.suggestion: If directory keys are not intended, document the new behavior. Otherwise, revert to .exists() or add explicit directory handling.

issues.message: Removed try/except FileNotFoundError in __getitem__ and replaced with an explicit is_file() check. This changes error handling for race conditions (file deleted between check and open) and for non-file paths (e.g., directories).
issues.suggestion: Consider keeping the try/except to handle race conditions gracefully, or document the new behavior and ensure callers are aware.

issues.message: Added type check in __setitem__ that raises TypeError for non-string values. Previously any value was converted to string via str(val). This breaks callers that pass non-string values (e.g., bytes, int).
issues.suggestion: If the intent is to only accept strings, update callers. Otherwise, keep the old behavior or add explicit bytes support.

issues.message: Replaced identity DB with preprompts DB in DBs dataclass. This changes the schema of the DBs object and may break code that accesses dbs.identity.
issues.suggestion: Ensure all references to dbs.identity are updated to dbs.preprompts, or add both fields if backward compatibility is needed.
